name: agent-app-store
tagline: Agent persona for browsing, publishing, deploying, and analyzing apps/templates in the Flow Nexus marketplace via its MCP tools.
verdict: No security red flags — the marketplace API calls match the declared publishing/deployment role. But it's mostly role narrative with no concrete output contract, no failure handling for a failed publish/deploy/search, no re-run safety for duplicate publishes, and an unstated hard dependency on the flow-nexus MCP server. The real frontmatter description is a.

highlights.summary: description is only 'Agent skill for app-store - invoke with $agent-app-store' — no trigger situations.
'Content Curation: Evaluate and organize applications for optimal discoverability' gives no concrete criteria for how to curate or organize.
